CustomField.description: For use with Lottery Reporting TASK0198615. This checkbox applies the "Proposed Lottery Application Level" to the donors actual "Lottery Application Level". When saving this record with this field checked, automation will trigger that change as well as a few other tasks such as saving off the previous app to field "Replaced Lottery Application Level".
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This checkbox applies the "Proposed Lottery Application Level" to the donors actual "Lottery Application Level". When saving this record with this field checked, automation will trigger that change as well as a few other tasks such as saving off the previous app to field "Replaced Lottery Application Level".
CustomField.label: Apply Proposed Lottery Application
